fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

telepractice_text: Oklahoma permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Oklahoma issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Oklahoma is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
